title: Notifications of {{recipient}}
subtitle: Read notifications of {{recipient}}. You can filter them by IUN Code and send date.
subtitle-delegated-notifications: Read the notifications delegated to {{recipient}}. You can filter them by IUN Code and send date.

errors.iun: Please enter a valid IUN code
errors.date-start: The start date must be before the end date
errors.date-end: The end date must be after the start date

empty-state.filtered: We couldn't find any results: try different filters. <0>Remove filters</0>
empty-state.delegate: There are no notifications delegated to {{name}} to read.

from-qrcode.not-found-subtitle: It can only be read by users registered by the recipient company or by its delegate.

detail.document-not-available: The document will be available for download in a few minutes. You can try again by reloading the page or clicking on the link of the requested document
detail.pec-unreachable: Keep your certified email (PEC) mailbox free and active to receive everything digitally!

cancelled.message: This notification has been cancelled by the issuing institution.

payment.title: Payment
payment.cancelled-alert-text-payment: For any reimbursement of payments related to this notification, please contact the sender. If you made a payment after the notification was cancelled, the list may not be updated.
payment.pay-with-f24: If you prefer, you can pay via F24.
payment.message-error-fetch-payment: We were unable to retrieve payment details for this notification.
payment.cancelled-message: For information regarding a possible refund, please contact the issuing institution.
payment.error-payment-failed-single: There was a problem with a Payment Notice. Press Reload to try again. If the error persists, contact the support team.
payment.error-payment-failed-multiple: There was a problem with multiple Payment Notices. Press Reload to try again. If the error persists, contact the support team.

status.succeded-tooltip: Your payment has been sent successfully.
status.failed-tooltip: The notice has expired and can no longer be paid. For more information, please contact the sender.
status.inprogress-tooltip: The payment is in progress. Please reload the page in a few hours to verify. If this is still in progress, please contact support.
status.canceled-tooltip: The notice has been revoked. For more information, please contact the sender.

error.notice-error: There's a problem with this notice.
error.assistence: Reload it or contact support with the error code
error.duplicated: This notice has already been paid for. The status will be updated shortly.

acts_files.downloadable_acts: Documents are available online for 120 days from the completion of the notification.
acts_files.not_downloadable_acts: 120 days have passed since the completion date. If you want to obtain the documents, please contact the sender.
acts_files.downloadable_aar: The acknowledgement of receipt is available online for 10 years from completion of the notification.
acts_files.not_downloadable_aar: As 10 years have passed since the completion date, the acknowledgement of receipt is no longer available.
acts_files.notification_cancelled_aar: As this notification has been cancelled, the download of the Acknowledgement of Receipt has been disabled.
acts_files.notification_cancelled_acts: Since this notification has been cancelled, the document download has been disabled.
acts_files.effected_faq: When do I complete a notification?

analog.title: Save money with SEND!
analog.message: One or more registered mail have been sent to you on behalf of the issuing institution at a total cost of {{analogCost}}, because this notification was not opened on digital channels within the required timeframes.
analog.fallback: One or more registered mail have been sent to you on behalf of the issuing institution because this notification was not opened on digital channels within the required timeframes. This will result in additional costs for you.

digital_failure.title: Save money with SEND!
digital_failure.message: We were unable to deliver the notification to your certified e-mail (PEC), so a registered mail was sent to you at a cost of {{analogCost}}.
digital_failure.fallback: We were unable to deliver the notification to your certified e-mail (PEC), so a registered mail was sent to you. This will result in additional costs for you.

digital_platform.title: With SEND you have saved!
digital_platform.message: Thanks to your active digital address, you avoided the registered mail and the related costs.

digital_special.title: With SEND you have saved!
digital_special.message: We sent the notification to the PEC address provided by the issuing institution, so you avoided the registered mail and the related costs.

digital_registry.title: With SEND you have saved!
digital_registry.message: We sent the notification to the PEC address in the public registries, so you avoided registered mail and the relative costs.

viewed.title: With SEND you have saved!
viewed.message: You opened the digital notification in time, avoiding the registered mail and the related costs.

message.default: Activate a digital address to receive future notifications digitally only.
message.analog: Activate SEND as your digital address to save on costs like this.
message.external-pec: Activate a digital address to choose where to receive your SEND notifications.

details.title: What are notification costs?
details.description: These are the costs related to sending the communication, which vary depending on how it is received by your business.
details.error: We were unable to retrieve the cost details, please try again later.
details.more-info: Contact the institution that sent the notification for more details on the costs of this communication.
